name: Rootseeds
desc_clean: Awoken 1 In one of these dreams, that I'm beginning to believe are visions of the past, Wyldenten showed me the creation of the Wildwood itself: seeds taken from Wyldenten's own body.
mechanic_summary: Rootseeds to Spell klanu Awoken. Awoken 1 In one of these dreams, that I'm beginning to believe are visions of the past, Wyldenten showed me the creation of the Wildwood itself: seeds taken from Wyldenten's own body. Keywords: brak.
